summary:
Pyruvate kinase is not part of gluconeogenesis as it functions solely in glycolysis. The other listed options play roles specifically in converting non-carbohydrates into glucose through gluconeogenesis processes. Summary sentence highlighting enzyme exclusivity within metabolic pathway context.
